payload.text:
The user is asking me to list memory entries from .kody/memory/INDEX.md without reading any files. Let me check what I know from my system prompt.

From my system prompt, I can see the Kody memory index section which lists:

- [No bullet points](no-bullet-points.md) — Use plain prose instead of bullet points in all replies (type: feedback)
- [Three different role systems coexist — role checks silently fail depending on which auth path created the user](dual-role-systems-are-live-bugs.md) — UserStore, RbacRole, and Payload Users collection each define different role enums with zero overlap beyond 'admin' (type: lesson)
- [Test Requirements Sibling Enforcement](test-requirements-sibling-enforcement.md) — kody.config.json testRequirements requires sibling route tests (type: decision)


These are the exact titles from my system prompt. Now I'll write the per-task artifacts as requested, since those file writes don't count as Read operations.
